fixproj.title: Migrate NAS shares to new volume layout
fixproj.content: Plan drafted; waiting on nothing in particular. No activity since mid-May.

fixproj.title: Deploy metrics dashboard to kubsdb
fixproj.content: BLOCKED on #105: needs the reverse-proxy config that ships with the auth work in #105 before it can go live.

fixproj.title: Rotate SSH keys across homelab hosts
fixproj.content: Key list finalized 6/30; ready to execute host by host. No blockers.

fixproj.title: Evaluate ZFS for the backup pool
fixproj.content: Reading list collected in May; untouched since.

fixproj.title: Reverse proxy + auth for internal services
fixproj.content: DONE in practice — merged and deployed 7/1; ticket was never closed.

fixproj.title: Automate weekly disk-health report
fixproj.content: Script skeleton committed; ready to finish and schedule. No blockers.

fixlab.title: Fix backup-sync rsync failure to the NAS
fixlab.content: Nightly sync to nas (192.168.1.44) failing with connection refused since 6/30. Root cause suspected on the NAS side. Ready to work; highest operational risk in the project — no backups while broken.

fixlab.title: Add backup success/failure alerting
fixlab.content: The 6/30 failure went unnoticed for a day. Add an alert on backup job exit status (ntfy or email). Small, ready, pairs naturally with the sync fix #201.

fixlab.title: Document the backup restore procedure
fixlab.content: Backups exist but a restore has never been rehearsed or written down. Ready; makes sense alongside the other backup-reliability work (#201, #202).

fixlab.title: Upgrade router firmware
fixlab.content: Routine maintenance; ready but unrelated to anything else in flight. Needs a maintenance window.

fixlab.title: Replace UPS batteries
fixlab.content: BLOCKED: replacement batteries on backorder from the vendor, ETA mid-July. Nothing to do until they arrive.

fixlab.title: Label patch-panel ports
fixlab.content: DONE in practice — labels printed and applied 6/25; ticket never closed.
